notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ FIPS Compliant for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 29 CVEs: CVE-2021-47459, CVE-2022-50087, CVE-2025-39751, CVE-2025-38472, CVE-2025-38718, and 24 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
